title: Add OMP hook installation recipes
description: Add profile-aware Just recipes that install the cmux OMP hook and then install pi-cmux into the same OMP profile.
design: Keep install package-only. Add install-hook [profile], setting OMP_PROFILE only while running cmux hooks setup omp --yes. Add install-with-hook [profile], which runs install-hook before the existing install recipe.
notes: The install-with-hook recipe comment identifies it as the recommended command for most installs. Tests use fake cmux and omp binaries to verify ordering, profile propagation, and listing documentation.

title: Suppress subagent cmux notifications
description: Prevent cmux OS notifications emitted for subagent lifecycle completions while preserving sidebar visibility for subagent activity and completion.
acceptance_criteria: Subagent lifecycle events update cmux sidebar state but never invoke cmux notification.create; main-agent notification behavior remains unchanged.
notes: Corrected after direct inspection of upstream OMP source at a0f7266f: OMP subagents are in-process AgentSessions, not child Pi processes. The executor creates sessions with hasUI: false and forwards their events to the parent session EventBus under task:subagent:event, task:subagent:progress, and task:subagent:lifecycle. ExtensionAPI.events is public. Correct implementation: use ctx.hasUI to suppress child extension notifications/sidebar ownership, and have the interactive main instance consume the task EventBus channels for subagent sidebar state.
close_reason: Headless OMP subagent notifications are suppressed; main sidebar now renders OMP subagent lifecycle and progress.

title: Make local installer resolve Pi SDK peer dependency
description:
Installed to /Users/andrew.burns/.pi/agent/packages/pi-cmux
Added ./packages/pi-cmux to /Users/andrew.burns/.pi/agent/settings.json
Run /reload in pi if it is already running. copies the package into ~/.pi/agent/packages/pi-cmux without node_modules. Launching pi from that installed copy failed to resolve @earendil-works/pi-coding-agent from extensions/cmux-continue.ts after npm ci in the source checkout. A temporary symlink to the source node_modules enabled the interactive verification and was removed afterward. Investigate supported package-manager/loader resolution and make fresh local installs work without a manual dependency link.
close_reason: Installer now links the resolved Pi SDK dependencies; isolated regression test verifies installed-package resolution.

title: Keep cmux status accurate during Pi planning
acceptance_criteria: Active Pi runs refresh the cmux status once per second, and OMP silent-abort control boundaries create neither cmux notifications nor raw sidebar logs.
close_reason: Implemented and verified elapsed sidebar status updates plus exact OMP silent-abort suppression.

title: Sync Dolt remote from Git origin
acceptance_criteria: The Just recipe derives a Dolt-compatible origin from Git origin and pushes Beads through the resulting remote.
close_reason: Added and executed sync-dolt-remote; Beads push succeeded through Git-origin-equivalent URL.
